title: The Road to Sabaody: Key Exchange
description: In the Sabaody Archipelago storyline, this section centers on Franky, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Duval as the scene develops across pages 9–12.
scene: This scene advances the Sabaody Archipelago conflict through Franky, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, focusing on the immediate stakes of the road to sabaody: key exchange.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Will you help me rescue Hacchin, Luffy-chin?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: It's the best in the world!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: That means okay! You know the place?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Can you show us the way?

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: splashing an arrow on the water's surface!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: All right!! Leave the helm to me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: She's the real thing, and she's amazing!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: You're the first one I've ever met.

summary: This scene advances the Sabaody Archipelago conflict through Franky, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, focusing on the immediate stakes of the road to sabaody: key exchange.
